content.query:
SELECT
'dim_employee' as sourceTable
,count(distinct EmployeeID) as records
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_dim]
WHERE IsActive = 'Y'

UNION

SELECT
'fact_employee' as sourceTable
,count(distinct EmployeeID) as records
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_fact]
WHERE IsActive = 'Y'

UNION

SELECT
'record_employee' as sourceTable
,count(distinct EmployeeID) as records
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_record_fact]
WHERE IsActive = 'Y'

UNION

SELECT
'record_records' as sourceTable
,count(distinct HRRecordID) as records
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_record_fact]
WHERE IsActive = 'Y'

UNION

SELECT
'leaver_leavers' as sourceTable
,Count(EmployeeLeaversID) as records
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_leavers_dim]
WHERE IsActive = 'Y'

UNION

SELECT
'leaver_employeeID' as sourceTable
,Count(EmployeeID) as records
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_leavers_dim]
WHERE IsActive = 'Y'
